translations.en: a busy looking man wearing a blue robe.
translations.zh: 一身藍袍、案牘勞形之男子。

translations.en: "So many books to keep organized, it's a wonder I have any time for my own studies..."
translations.zh: 「書冊浩如煙海，整理起來耗時費力，哪還有餘閒自修……」

translations.en: "Can I help you with something?"
"I am Thariand, of the blue @star."
"All the students of @Nicodemus bear this sign."
translations.zh: 「凡@Nicodemus（尼科）德穆斯門下弟子，皆以此為標誌。」

translations.en: "He lives southeast of @Yew."
"Somebody there should be able to give you directions."
"I'm the librarian."
*"I prefer to spend my time studying @magic, but I'll help you find some @books if you keep it quick."
translations.zh: *「吾本更願鑽研@magic（魔法），但若汝能長話短說，吾可代汝尋些@books（書冊）。」

translations.en: "Were I to master all the arcane lore contained within these volumes, I'd be the greatest sorcerer of all time!"*
translations.zh: 「若吾能盡覽這批典籍中所有秘術，必可成就古往今來第一大術師！」*

translations.en: "Of course, finding all the right books is no small task..."
translations.zh: 「當然，尋齊所需書冊亦非易事……」

translations.en: "Oh, I'm sorry, I just remembered. That book was checked out last week. Try coming back for it later."
translations.zh: 「噢，抱歉，吾這才想起——那本書上週已借出去了。汝改日再來試試吧。」

translations.en: "We have a book that tells the history of the shrines. If only I could remember the title..."
translations.zh: 「我館藏有一冊記載聖壇歷史之書，只是書名一時想不起來……」

translations.en: "Remember, any books you take out of here are due back before the next bipolar lunar conjunction!"
translations.zh: 「請記住，凡從此處借出之書冊，須於下次雙月交會前歸還！」

translations.en: "You could probably find more information on that topic in Priliwig's Universial Compendium of Knowledge."
translations.zh: 「汝或許能在《普利維格萬用知識大全》中找到更多相關資料。」

translations.en: Were you interested in:
A. Fiction
B. Non-fiction
C. Reference
In that category I can recommend:
translations.zh: 此類目吾可推薦以下書目：

translations.en: The Caverns of Freitag
Around the World in a Washtub
The Wizard of Oz
In that category I can recommend:
translations.zh: 此類目吾可推薦以下書目：

translations.en: Mating Rituals of the Northern Plains Centaur
Of Dreams and Visions
The Lost Art of Ballooning
Summoning Incubi for Fun and Profit
In that category I can recommend:
translations.zh: 此類目吾可推薦以下書目：

translations.en: Dilzal's Almanac of Good Advice
translations.note: book title; 避『年』→不用「年曆」

translations.en: Priliwig's Universal Compendium of Knowledge
The Lost Book of Mantras
"Is there anything else you wanted to find?"
"Fine. You should have no trouble finding what you want once you have the call number."
translations.zh: 「甚好。只要手中有索書號碼，汝便不難尋得所需。」

translations.en: "You do understand how our books are organized, don't you?"
translations.zh: 「汝應當曉得我館書冊的排列方式，對吧？」

translations.en: "Good. I have more important things to do than explain it to you."
translations.zh: 「甚好。吾還有更重要的事情要辦，實在無暇向汝解說。」

translations.en: "Well then, I'd suggest you look it up in The Beginner's Guide to the @Dewey Decimal System."
translations.zh: 「既然如此，吾建議汝查閱《@Dewey（杜威）十進位分類法入門指引》。」

translations.en: "Its call number is T17 0035 r16RL.5 v43."

translator_notes: Thariand 是學苑圖書館員，語氣帶點書卷氣但略顯牢騷。書目名稱全數翻譯並加《》。索書號碼（如 821.34 Rzl4n）純為系統資料，不翻譯。避免使用 5C trail 字，以「薩里安」代 Thariand。Nicodemus 依發音譯為「尼科德穆斯」。
